---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new cleanup target, behavior, or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the storage waste or friction point you experience.
Example: "I have 20GB of Homebrew downloads that never get cleaned up."

## Proposed solution

What should MacCleaner do? Be specific — which paths, commands, or behaviors should change?

## Category

- [ ] CLI (`cleaner.py`) — new cleanup target or flag
- [ ] Menu Bar App (`AppDelegate.swift`) — UI or display change
- [ ] Installer (`install.sh`) — setup behavior
- [ ] Scheduler (`scheduler.sh`) — cron scheduling
- [ ] Config (`config.json`) — new configurable option

## Are you willing to contribute a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional context

Links to documentation, similar tools, or screenshots.
